name: WHIRLPOOL CORP /DE/
summary: Our Company Improving life at home has been at the heart of our business for 114 years it is why we exist and why we are passionate about what we do. Whirlpool Corporation ("Whirlpool"), committed to being the best kitchen and laundry company, in constant pursuit of improving life at home, was incorporated in 1955 under the laws of Delaware and was founded in 1911.
